setting.description: When enabled the article will automatically be deposited on the stage set by "Production Manager Stage".
setting.name: enable_transport

setting.description: Defines the stage which triggers depositing the article into the FTP server. The article is deposited upon entering the chosen stage.
setting.name: transport_production_stage

setting.description: Contact email address of production manager.
setting.name: transport_production_manager

setting.description: Email template, sent to production manager when an article is transported.
setting.name: transport_email_production_manager

value.default:
A new article, {{ article.title|safe }}, has been accepted in the journal {{ journal.name }}.

A JATS XML stub and all of this article's files have been deposited via FTP.

Article editors are listed below:

{% for editor in article.editor_list %}

{{ editor.full_name }}, {{ editor.email }}

{% endfor %}

setting.description: FTP server password. Will not show once saved.
setting.name: transport_ftp_password

setting.description: When enabled the article (.zip) will automatically be transfered via the method set in "Production Transfer Type".
setting.name: enable_enable_transport_custom_files

setting.description: Defines the method of file transfer.
setting.name: transfer_method_type

setting.description: Python import path which returns the export .zip filepath given a journal code and article ID.
setting.name: file_transfer_zip_function

setting.description: Python import path to a function called if .zip transfer succeeds.
setting.name: file_transfer_zip_success_callback

setting.description: Python import path to a function called if .zip transfer fails.
setting.name: file_transfer_zip_failure_callback

setting.description: Python import path which returns the export .go.xml filepath given a journal code and article ID.
setting.name: file_transfer_go_function

setting.description: Python import path to a function called if .go.xml transfer succeeds.
setting.name: file_transfer_go_success_callback

setting.description: Python import path to a function called if .go.xml transfer fails.
setting.name: file_transfer_go_failure_callback
